name: boundary-reference-compliance
task: Create a horizontal bar chart widget for showing short interest as a percentage of float for multiple tickers. Include a legend.
assertions: Response reads or references project-docs/argus-style-guide.md before creating the component
Chart bars have border-radius applied only to the top (or the leading edge for horizontal) — not uniformly rounded on all corners
The legend uses square color indicators (approximately 8px) with border-radius 2px as specified in the SKILL.md checklist
The widget uses var(--chart-1), var(--chart-2), etc. for bar colors — not arbitrary colors or inline hex values
Tooltips (if included) use var(--bg-tertiary) for background and var(--border) for border with border-radius 8px
